title: leonurus persicus
intro: Leonurus persicus, also known as Persian leopard's balm or Persian motherwort, is a perennial herb native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Leonurus persicus include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, alleviate menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms, and lower blood pressure. Leonurus persicus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
